message:
fix: test regression, Copilot cleanup, error boundary, poll stop, cache eviction, Content-Type (#6838-#6845) (#6847)

* fix: test regression from #6816 agent non-ok change, remove duplicate comment, simplify nested try/catch (#6844, #6845)

- Update test #38 to expect pendingOrFailed() instead of REST fallback
  when agent returns non-ok response (#6844)
- Remove duplicated #6816 comment block in useDeployMissions.ts (#6845)
- Remove redundant nested try/catch around startMission in
  LaunchSequence.tsx — the outer catch already handles failures (#6845)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: error boundary for FlightPlanBlueprint, canAdvance targetClusters check, poll stop on terminal (#6838, #6839, #6840)

- Wrap lazy-loaded FlightPlanBlueprint in ChunkErrorBoundary so chunk
  load failures show recovery UI instead of white screen (#6838)
- Add state.targetClusters.length > 0 as alternative canAdvance
  condition for Phase 2 so users aren't stuck (#6839)
- Stop polling interval when all missions reach terminal status to
  avoid unnecessary API requests (#6840)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: O(1) cache eviction with insertion-order slice, add Content-Type header to ShareToGitHub (#6841, #6842)

- Replace O(n) map scan in evictOldestLocked with an insertOrder slice
  for O(1) oldest-key lookup (#6841)
- Add Content-Type: application/json to the GitHub Contents API PUT
  request in ShareToGitHub to prevent 415 responses (#6842)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
